title: PVP/ANARCHY SMP
description: modpack that improves smp experiences by adding some mods for content creation, better pvp based settings and gui/utility in order to escape, kill, find, etc players. Hope this helps you!
body:
**This pack is full of mods and resource packs to help and improve your SMP gameplay with some utility, pvp, performance and customisation mods. This modpack is alos for the use of content creator with mods like replay mod and some better visiblity and cpu optimizing mods. I made this modpack out of what my experiences have been on plenty of diffrent smp and public server and combined all of the usefull mods into one! Hope this will help you! :)**

in this mod pack you will find some utility mods like: Xerio's Wolrd map, replay mod, InvMove. Some other mod for performance such as: sodium, sodium extra's, lithium,etc. You will also find some building mods like axiom and some quality of like mods like sounds.
